case_title: KATHY LEE VS. PATRICK MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, KATHY AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, KATHY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-18-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST KATHY LEE, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-25-2012, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-11-2012. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-25-2012 CONTINUED TO AUG-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-28-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
NO APPEARANCE NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-28-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
